creator: vince@vincentbentley.co.uk
text:
Changing ownership of the following directory trees to git:git fixed the problem starting the gitea service:

chown -R git:git /usr/local/etc/gitea
chown -R git:git /var/db/gitea
chown -R git:git /var/log/gitea

The startup script /usr/local/etc/rc.d/gitea sets GITEA_WORK_DIR to /usr/local/share/gitea but this directory does not exist. I assume that it does not get created if BINDATA is set. It does not appear to cause any problems.
